meta.title: AoD Podcast | An Innovative Arsenal of Democracy Benefits More than Just Defense (feat. Adam Hammer)
meta.description: Co-founder and CEO of Roadrunner Venture Studios, Adam Hammer, joins host Marshall Kosloff to explain what "deep tech" is, why the Arsenal of Democracy is often fought and won by people in white lab coats, and how the spoils of defense innovation are shared commercially.
